source.authority: Hellenic Ministry of National Economy and Finance
source.scope: Official-source-backed Greece tax-year 2026 profile-aware annual individual income-tax schedules.

GR.notes: Profile-aware employment, pension and business-profit tariffs using caller-confirmed age band, eligible dependent-child count and taxable income. Article 16 employment and pension credits are applied with the statutory taper; presumptive business income and other schedules remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Tax-year 2026 profile-aware employment, pension and business-profit annual income tax.
